haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL: test_tag_generator.py referenced in workflow (line 43) but NOT provided—workflow cannot run. Bash lacks `set -euo pipefail`. Input override logic (lines 38–51) duplicated 4× for branch/sha/pr/tags—should be helper function. No actionlint validation evidence. No act-result.txt artifact. Python script well-structured but incomplete deliverable.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Idiomatic Python script. Workflow uses least-privilege and pinned actions. Security: direct interpolation of github.event.inputs into shell (82-91) risks injection; should use env vars. Bash logic is repetitive and lacks 'set -e'. Maintainable and well-structured.
